key.name: poll-interval
key.description: How often DevWatch rescans /proc and running ports in the background. Lower values give fresher data at the cost of slightly more CPU usage. Valid range: 5–60 seconds.

key.name: show-system-ports
key.description: When enabled, all listening ports are shown — not just the built-in dev-port set (3000, 5173, 8080, …). This is off by default to keep the panel compact.

key.name: notify-port-conflicts
key.summary: Fire GNOME notifications on newly occupied dev ports
key.description: When a dev port (e.g. 3000, 5173) is first occupied by a new process, DevWatch fires a GNOME desktop notification. Disable if you find these notifications noisy.

key.name: max-build-history
key.summary: Maximum build history rows shown in panel
key.description: How many completed build runs appear in the Build Performance section of the panel dropdown. Valid range: 1–20.

key.name: open-devwatch
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to open DevWatch panel
key.description: Key binding to toggle the DevWatch panel dropdown open/closed. Default is Super+D. Set to an empty array to disable.
